summary: CRITICAL: Unpinned actions (lines 7-8, 11-13) violate security best practices. TDD methodology ignored—no unit test file with red-green-refactor. act testing requirement explicitly stated but skipped (test-harness.js:97 'Docker complexity'). Async/await misuse in index.js. test-demo.sh lacks assertions. Core version logic sound but fails core requirements; not shippable.
